title: ormosia dasycarpa var. minor
intro: Ormosia dasycarpa var. minor is a plant species belonging to the family Leguminosae, commonly known as a type of tree or shrub. It is native to certain regions, particularly in Asia. Ormosia dasycarpa var. minor has been found to possess medicinal properties due to the presence of flavonoids, alkaloids, and other compounds in its extracts. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, and has been traditionally prepared into herbal teas and infusions for its health benefits.
